skills.name: cloud-upload
skills.description: Ship a finished, integrated game build to the Ludeo cloud with the @ludeo/cli tool. Walks four gates — compile + Ludeo-SDK check, a named QA test scenario, build-folder validation, then authenticate and upload via the CLI and poll until the build finishes processing. Trigger when the user wants to upload/ship/publish a packaged build to Ludeo — e.g. "upload my build to Ludeo", "publish the build", "ship to Ludeo cloud", "ludeo builds upload". NOT for writing SDK integration code — use the engine integration skill for that.
